message:
chore(matrix): export fchmodat2 + eventfd2 + 4 rt_sig* via libc.map + support_matrix (4002 sym)

Roll the ABI bookkeeping forward to absorb the six new symbols
shipped in c269d064 / 0c61ad9d / 72a9b927:

crates/frankenlibc-abi/version_scripts/libc.map
  - GLIBC_2.2.5 export block grows by six lines:
      fchmodat2          (next to fchmodat in the *at family)
      eventfd2           (next to eventfd in the eventfd group)
      rt_sigprocmask     ┐
      rt_sigqueueinfo    │ added under "/* signal extras */",
      rt_sigsuspend      │ next to sigqueue/sigtimedwait
      rt_tgsigqueueinfo  ┘
  - Order picks the family-grouped slot so a future reader can find
    each symbol next to its peers without grepping.

support_matrix.json
  - total_exported: 3996 -> 4002 (matches the six new ABI shims).
  - Six new entries, each with status=RawSyscall (since the
    refactor in 72a9b927 made them all dispatch via
    syscall::sys_*) and module=unistd_abi:
      eventfd2:           perf_class=syscall_veneer; strict and
                          hardened semantics both "Raw Linux syscall
                          SYS_eventfd2; POSIX errno on failure" /
                          "Raw syscall with deterministic errno
                          propagation".
      fchmodat2, rt_sigprocmask, rt_sigqueueinfo, rt_sigsuspend,
      rt_tgsigqueueinfo: same shape per their syscall semantics.

tests/conformance/support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json
  - Generator picked up the six new entries; per-status counts and
    per-module deltas refreshed accordingly. The 49-line diff is
    the standard "regenerate against the new matrix" rewrite, not
    a separate behavioral change.

Pure bookkeeping; no library code touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
   "version": 2,
   "generated_at_utc": "2026-02-18T04:49:26Z",
   "library": "/data/tmp/cargo-target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so",
-  "total_exported": 3996,
+  "total_exported": 4002,
   "taxonomy": {
     "Implemented": "Native Rust code owns the entire operation. No host libc dependency. Full test coverage required.",
     "RawSyscall": "ABI entrypoint marshals arguments directly to Linux syscall instruction. No glibc call-through.",
@@ -3173,6 +3173,15 @@
       "perf_class": "syscall_veneer",
       "semantics": "Linux"
     },
+    {
+      "symbol": "eventfd2",
+      "status": "RawSyscall",
+      "module": "unistd_abi",
+      "perf_class": "syscall_veneer",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_eventfd2; POSIX errno on failure",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
     {
       "symbol": "eventfd_read",
       "status": "Implemented",
@@ -3418,6 +3427,15 @@
       "perf_class": "syscall_veneer",
       "semantics": "POSIX"
     },
+    {
+      "symbol": "fchmodat2",
+      "status": "RawSyscall",

+      "perf_class": "syscall_veneer",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_fchmodat2; POSIX errno on failure",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with null pathname validation and deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
     {
       "symbol": "fchown",
       "status": "RawSyscall",
@@ -12256,6 +12274,24 @@

       "default_stub": false
     },
+    {
+      "symbol": "rt_sigprocmask",

+      "module": "unistd_abi",
+      "perf_class": "syscall",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_rt_sigprocmask with explicit sigset_t size argument",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
+    {
+      "symbol": "rt_sigqueueinfo",
+      "status": "RawSyscall",
+      "module": "unistd_abi",
+      "perf_class": "syscall",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_rt_sigqueueinfo with caller-supplied siginfo_t",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with null siginfo_t validation and deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
     {
       "symbol": "sigqueue",
       "status": "RawSyscall",
@@ -12328,6 +12364,24 @@
       "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall; membrane-gated signal suspension with EINTR on delivery",
       "default_stub": false
     },
+    {
+      "symbol": "rt_sigsuspend",
+      "status": "RawSyscall",
+      "module": "unistd_abi",
+      "perf_class": "syscall",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_rt_sigsuspend with explicit sigset_t size argument",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with null mask validation and deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
+    {

+      "perf_class": "syscall",
+      "strict_semantics": "Raw Linux syscall SYS_rt_tgsigqueueinfo with caller-supplied siginfo_t",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Raw syscall with null siginfo_t validation and deterministic errno propagation",
+      "default_stub": false
+    },
     {
       "symbol": "sigtimedwait",
       "status": "RawSyscall",
